config.description: Provider-specific fields describing the external issue to create. Required keys depend on the integration kind: github -> {repository, title, body}; gitlab -> {title, body}; linear -> {team_id, title, description}; jira -> {project_key, title, description}. Examples: github {"repository":"posthog","title":"Checkout TypeError","body":"Stack trace"}; linear {"team_id":"team-id","title":"Checkout TypeError","description":"Stack trace"}; jira {"project_key":"ENG","title":"Checkout TypeError","description":"Stack trace"}.

integration_id.description: ID of the connected integration to create the external issue with. List the project's integrations to find the right ID and its kind (one of 'github', 'gitlab', 'linear', 'jira').

issue.description: ID of the error tracking issue to link the reference to.
